### ObservableType

_A quantum observable for use in measurements._

Syntax: `!quantum.obs`


### QubitType

_A value-semantic qubit (state)._

Syntax: `!quantum.bit`


### QuregType

_An array of value-semantic qubits (i.e. quantum register)._

Syntax: `!quantum.reg`


### ResultType

_A quantum measurement result._

Syntax: `!quantum.res`
